title: RAWs Protocol
description: Programmable revenue allocation wrappers that automatically split and redistribute revenue among contributors, users, partners, and liquidity pools in real-time.

title: Confidential Computing
description: Run private workloads in encrypted compute environments contributed by the community. Pay-per-cycle compute model with privacy by design.

title: Blockchain Payroll
description: On-chain payroll automation with integrated tax logic, crypto/fiat conversion, and employee yield-generation on salaries.

title: Real Yield Staking
description: Sustainable yield models backed by actual economic activity: payroll flow, compute usage, and platform fees—not inflation.

title: Multi-Chain Support
description: Seamlessly operate across Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, and Base with unified yield and revenue distribution.

title: Developer SDK
description: Comprehensive tools and APIs for integrating Hyper's monetization modules into your applications and business models.
